themes.label: Guidance
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes leading, direction, teaching, or the path God sets before His people. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 12 verses. Commentary leans on "What does their inclusion teach us about God's power to redeem troubled histories?".
